Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 288 

WVR_1115_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: 1115 Waiver Type Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A code to indicate the type of 1115 waiver under which the beneficiary received coverage; most 
recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_1115_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: WVR_1115_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Waiver 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
